title: Can't edit my webhooks anymore
excerpt:
Hi, 
It seems that my hooks stopped working. 
When I try to edit them on monday side, I can’t. 
See the screenshot attached. Can anyone at monday help me on this? 
  
Cheers

posts.author: Zalayeta (Mathieu)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

When I try to edit them on monday side, I can’t.

posts.author: dipro (Dipro Bhowmik)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Zalayeta,

The only configuration information that our webhooks contain is the Webhook URL. To change this, you’ll need to edit the authentication information here:

image2972×922 178 KB

Do let me know if that helps!

Cheers,
Dipro
